title: Bread to Toast
description: Changes Bread, Golden Apples, and Enchanted Golden Apples to Toast!
body:
# Bread Info
Pack that changes a few items to be Toast themed!
I created this due to a lack of Toast resource packs, so enjoy!

Changes:
- Bread -> Toast
- Golden Apple -> Golden Toast
- Enchanted Golden Apple -> Enchanted Toast

## Other
Support-A-Creator Code: TS5
